mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS forestId , f.name AS forestName , f.is_public AS isPublic , f.background_id AS backgroundId , f.user_id AS userId , b.image_url AS backgroundImageUrl FROM forest f LEFT JOIN background b ON f.background_id = b.id WHERE f.id = #{forestId}

SELECT p.id AS placement_id , p.position_x AS placement_position_x , p.position_y AS placement_position_y , p.width AS placement_width , p.height AS placement_height , p.z_index AS placement_z_index , fi.id AS forest_item_id , fi.placed_count , i.id AS item_id , i.name AS item_name , i.image_url AS item_image_url FROM forest f JOIN forest_item fi ON fi.forest_id = f.id JOIN placement p ON p.forest_item_id = fi.id LEFT JOIN item i ON fi.item_id = i.id WHERE f.id = #{forestId}
SELECT u.nickname FROM shared_forest sf JOIN user u ON sf.user_id = u.id WHERE sf.forest_id = #{forestId}

SELECT f.id AS forestId , f.name AS forestName , COUNT(DISTINCT sf.user_id) AS memberCount FROM shared_forest sf JOIN forest f ON sf.forest_id = f.id WHERE sf.forest_id IN ( SELECT forest_id FROM shared_forest WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY f.id, f.name ORDER BY f.id

SELECT fi.id AS id , fi.item_id AS itemId , fi.total_count AS totalCount , fi.placed_count AS placedCount , i.`name` AS itemName , i.category_id AS categoryId , i.image_url AS imageUrl FROM forest_item fi JOIN item i ON fi.item_id = i.id JOIN forest f ON fi.forest_id = f.id WHERE fi.forest_id = #{forestId} AND i.category_id = #{categoryId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shared_forest sf WHERE sf.forest_id = f.id )
select count(*) AS writtenDiaryCount FROM diary d JOIN forest f ON d.forest_id = f.id WHERE f.id = #{forestId}
